query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed my research on Magnificent 7 large acquisitions ($10B+) in 2026. Here's the bottom line:

**Two Mag 7 deals ≥$10B in 2026:**
- **Alphabet–Wiz ($32B)** — closed March 11, 2026; Alphabet's largest-ever acquisition (cloud security → Google Cloud).
- **Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.6B)** — announced April 14, 2026; **still pending/closing as of June-July 2026**. This is the primary pending Mag 7 deal. It also involves Amazon acquiring Apple's ~20% Globalstar stake and powering Apple's iPhone satellite services.

**Large quasi-acquisition:**
- **Nvidia–Groq (~$20B)** — structured as a non-exclusive licensing/acqui-hire (late Dec 2025) to sidestep antitrust; drew a Senate inquiry in March 2026.

**Notable non-qualifying items:**
- Meta–Manus (~$2B) was blocked by China and unwound by June 2026.
- Apple explored Mistral/Perplexity but no $10B+ deal materialized; the Perplexity deal was reported dead.
- Tesla made no ≥$10B acquisition; the SpaceX–xAI $1.25T merger explicitly excluded Tesla.

**Mid-2026 answer to your core question:** As of June-July 2026, no *new* $10B+ Mag 7 acquisition was announced or firmly rumored — **Amazon–Globalstar was the only large Mag 7 deal still pending**. The 2026 megadeal landscape is dominated by non-Mag-7 transactions (Netflix–WBD $83B, PIF/Silver Lake–EA $55B, Charter–Cox $34.5B), while the Mag 7 giants are pouring $700B+ into AI capex rather than large outright acquisitions.

Full details, data points, and sources have been captured in the structured output.

sources.title: Wiz's Founders And Investors Cash Out As Google's $32 Billion Takeover Closes
sources.snippet: Google has closed its $32 billion all-cash acquisition of Wiz, completing the largest purchase in the company's history.

sources.title: Google Closes $32B Wiz Deal: Cloud Security Reset [2026]
sources.snippet: Google closed its $32 billion acquisition of Wiz on March 11, 2026, ending a 12-month regulatory marathon.

sources.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
sources.snippet: Amazon said Tuesday it would acquire Globalstar for $90 a share, in a deal worth about $11.57 billion.

sources.title: Amazon to acquire Globalstar and expand Amazon Leo satellite network
sources.snippet: Amazon and Apple enter agreement for Amazon Leo to power satellite services for supported iPhone and Apple Watch models.

sources.title: Amazon to Acquire Apple's Globalstar Stake in Satellite Deal
sources.snippet: Amazon has worked out a deal to take over Apple's stake in the satellite company, per an FCC filing.

sources.title: Breaking Down Amazon's Globalstar Acquisition
sources.snippet: Amazon's second-largest acquisition on record, surpassed only by the $13.7 billion Whole Foods purchase in 2017.

sources.title: Nvidia buying AI chip startup Groq's assets for about $20 billion in its largest deal on record
sources.snippet: Nvidia has agreed to buy assets from Groq for $20 billion in cash.

sources.title: Nvidia-Groq deal is structured to keep 'fiction of competition alive,' analyst says
sources.snippet: Non-exclusive licensing agreement; Nvidia hasn't issued a press release or regulatory filing.

sources.title: Warren, Blumenthal Question Whether NVIDIA's $20 Billion Groq Deal is Attempt to Avoid Antitrust Laws
sources.snippet: Senate inquiry into whether the deal structure avoids antitrust review.

sources.title: China blocks Meta's $2 billion takeover of AI startup Manus
sources.snippet: China's state planner called for Meta to unwind its $2 billion acquisition of Manus.

sources.title: Beijing Forces Meta to Unwind Its $2 Billion Manus Deal
sources.snippet: Meta has begun dismantling its $2 billion acquisition of Manus (June 2026).

sources.title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
sources.snippet: Meta acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence (ARI) for an undisclosed sum.

sources.title: Microsoft commits $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to new AI implementation unit
sources.snippet: Microsoft is investing $2.5 billion into a new group (Microsoft Frontier Co.) focused on AI implementations.

sources.title: Apple still debating Mistral and Perplexity M&A amid looming Google Search shakeup
sources.snippet: Apple considering Perplexity/Mistral acquisition; Eddy Cue pro-acquisition despite internal pushback.

sources.title: Musk's xAI, SpaceX combo is the biggest merger of all time, valued at $1.25 trillion
sources.snippet: SpaceX acquired xAI in an all-stock merger valuing the combined entity at $1.25 trillion; Tesla not included.

sources.title: SpaceX bails out xAI in mega-deal — here's what it means for Tesla
sources.snippet: The acquisition notably does not include Tesla, which just invested $2 billion in xAI.

sources.title: Upcoming M&A Deals: Mergers and Acquisitions Tracker
sources.snippet: Pending 2026-2027 deals led by Netflix-Warner Bros. Discovery ($83B), PIF/Silver Lake-EA ($55B), Charter-Cox ($34.5B).

sources.title: Global M&A industry trends: 2026 mid-year outlook
sources.snippet: Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft expected to spend more than $700bn in 2026 on infrastructure.

sources.title: Mag 7 value shrinks by $2.3 trillion amid AI spending jitters
sources.snippet: Around $2.3 trillion wiped off the value of the Magnificent 7 in June 2026 amid AI-spending scrutiny.
